howItWorks.intro: This ai image batch pricing calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Monthly Cost
rules.formula: Monthly Cost = Images × Cost per Image
rules.explanation: Total images generated multiplied by the per-image rate for your platform and resolution.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates based on standard formulas. Verify with current local data for your specific situation.

faq.q: Which AI image platform is cheapest?
faq.a: Stable Diffusion API is typically cheapest per image, while DALL-E 3 offers the best prompt adherence at a higher price.

faq.q: Can I run AI image generation locally for free?
faq.a: Yes, Stable Diffusion can run locally on a GPU with 8GB+ VRAM, eliminating per-image costs after hardware investment.
